item.title: PHEWAS, TWAS, Mendelian Randomization in Osteoporosis Research: the good, the bad, and the ugly.
item.description: Current osteoporosis reports - Review - While GWAS has identified many loci associated with bone mineral density (BMD), translating these findings into functional insights and treatments remains challenging. Post-GWAS methods such as Tra...

item.title: IBD risk locus rs1077773 enhances aryl hydrocarbon receptor activity and modulates immune cell function in vitro.
item.description: Inflammation research : official journal of the European Histamine Research Society ... [et al.] - The inflammatory bowel diseases (IBD) Crohn's disease (CD) and ulcerative colitis (UC) are disorders that cause chronic inflammation of the gastrointestinal tract. item.title: Shared genetic architecture between major depressive disorder and inflammatory bowel disease: Insights from large-scale genome-wide cross-trait analysis.
item.description: Human immunology - Major depressive disorder (MDD) and inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) exhibit clinical associations, yet the cross-disease genetic links and shared mechanisms between them remain unclear. This study...

item.title: Mapping adaptive immune responses toward fungal antigens in inflammatory bowel disease using T cell repertoire sequencing and phage-immunoprecipitation sequencing.
item.description: Journal of Crohn's & colitis - Immune reactivity to the gut mycobiome has been implicated in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD), particularly Crohn's disease (CD), but the systemic adaptive immune repertoire targeting the gut myco...

item.title: A NOD2-Encoded Toggle Switch Resolves the Host-Microbe Battle Over Cyclic AMP Control.
item.description: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology - Pathogens hijack macrophages by triggering pathological cAMP surges that block phagolysosomal killing-a defect mirrored in phagocytes from refractory colitis. We identify a host-encoded, pathogen-s...
